events.content: It seems that no relevant documents were found. Let's try searching directly for the policy related to returns on stoves.

results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — stoves.
Customers may return stoves within 45 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — stoves.
All stoves sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Care Guide — stoves.
To extend the life of your stoves: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

To extend the life of your stoves: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.'}; return docs['return_policy'].split('Customers may return stoves within ')[1].split('
Items must include original tags')[0]
